orders.text: You took my land. Prepare for war.
Your war is too late. I'm stronger now.
Come and face my steel, coward.
Your weak forces won't stop me.
Your fort won't save you next time.
Your swamp is mine. Leave or die.
You took my pass. Now I take it back.
You took my pass. I will take it back.
Your fort at howling pass will fall. Retreat now or die.
Your time is over. We reclaim what is ours.
Your forts won't save you from my hosts.
Your forces near our borders are noted. We declare war.
Your ruins are mine. Prepare to lose them.
